description_long: This object is a detailed model of a NASA Space Shuttle orbiter, featuring a streamlined white fuselage with black thermal protection tiles along the nose, wing edges, and underbelly. The wings are delta-shaped and low-mounted, with a slight upward dihedral and black leading edges. At the rear, three large main engines are visible, flanked by two smaller orbital maneuvering system pods and a vertical stabilizer with a black tip. The cockpit is located at the forward end, with a distinctive black windshield and window arrangement. The landing gear is partially visible, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear at the front. The surface is smooth and glossy, with visible panel lines and NASA insignia.
description: A NASA Space Shuttle orbiter with a white fuselage, black-tipped delta wings, and three large rear engines. The cockpit is forward-mounted with a black windshield, and the surface is smooth and glossy.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full delta wing shape, black leading edges, and the forward cockpit windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the wing profile, and the rear engine cluster.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three main engines, two maneuvering pods, and the vertical stabilizer.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the opposite wing and engine arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing delta configuration with slight upward dihedral and black leading edges; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Three rear-mounted jet engines with two additional maneuvering pods flanking the main engines.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and no horizontal stabilizers visible apart from the wing's trailing edge.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with a black windshield and multiple windows.
